title: Social-Blobs Error Test Vectors
description: Test vectors for validating error handling and invalid inputs

vectors.name: content_too_long_chars
vectors.description: Message exceeds 280 character limit

input.author: 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111
input.content: This message is intentionally over 280 characters to test the validation. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.

vectors.name: content_too_long_bytes
vectors.description: Message within character limit but exceeds byte limit

input.author: 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111
input.note: 280 emoji = 1120 bytes (4 bytes each), exceeds 1120 byte limit

vectors.name: invalid_address_format
vectors.description: Author address is not a valid Ethereum address

vectors.name: invalid_address_length
vectors.description: Address is hex but wrong length

vectors.name: negative_timestamp
vectors.description: Timestamp is negative

vectors.name: future_timestamp
vectors.description: Timestamp is too far in the future

vectors.name: nonce_too_large
vectors.description: Nonce exceeds uint16 maximum (65535)

vectors.name: negative_nonce
vectors.description: Negative nonce value

vectors.name: invalid_signature_type
vectors.description: Signature type is not 'bls' or 'ecdsa'

vectors.name: invalid_replyTo_format
vectors.description: replyTo is not a valid bytes32 hash

vectors.name: invalid_utf8
vectors.description: Content contains invalid UTF-8 sequences

vectors.name: batch_too_many_authors
vectors.description: Batch exceeds 256 author limit

vectors.name: batch_author_index_oob
vectors.description: Message references author index beyond author table

binaryInput.note: Binary batch with authorCount=2 but message references index 3

vectors.name: batch_timestamp_delta_overflow
vectors.description: Timestamp delta exceeds uint16 maximum

messages.author: 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111
messages.note: Delta = 65536 seconds, exceeds uint16 max of 65535

vectors.name: batch_exceeds_blob_size
vectors.description: Batch size exceeds 128KB blob limit

input.note: 20,000 messages would exceed blob capacity even with compression

vectors.name: invalid_magic_number
vectors.description: Binary data has wrong magic number

binaryInput.note: Should be 0x534F424D for message or 0x534F4231 for batch

vectors.name: unsupported_version
vectors.description: Binary data has unsupported protocol version

vectors.name: truncated_message
vectors.description: Binary message is truncated (incomplete)

binaryInput.note: Message header indicates 100 bytes of content but only 50 bytes present

vectors.name: decompression_failed
vectors.description: Compressed batch data cannot be decompressed

binaryInput.note: Batch has compression flag set but data is invalid Zstd

vectors.name: signature_verification_failed
vectors.description: Signature does not verify against message hash

binaryInput.note: Valid format but signature does not match message content
